name: Figma Make Kit Builder
description: Produces publishable Figma Make custom kits at CMS-complexity level. Ships 8 seed kits (cms-admin-shell, workflow-builder, multi-tenant-workspace, analytics-composer, power-data-table, marketplace-console, ai-search-chat-shell, creator-lms) sharing a foundation-locked token system so components cut from one kit compose cleanly with another. Complexity gate rejects generic landing/pricing proposals.
